modal.title: Help & Knowledge Base
modal.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or browse categories

platformOverview.title: Platform Overview
platformOverview.description: Learn what ProCrèche Solutions is and how it connects the Swiss childcare ecosystem.
platformOverview.content:
What is ProCrèche Solutions?

ProCrèche Solutions is an all-in-one platform connecting the Swiss childcare ecosystem:

• Daycares (Foundations) - Manage parent leads, place orders, and recruit staff
• Product Suppliers - List products and manage orders/inquiries
• Service Providers - List services and manage service requests
• Educators - Build a profile, set availability, and apply to jobs
• Parents - Browse daycares and send enquiries

Supported Languages

The platform is available in three languages:
• English
• Français (French)
• Deutsch (German)

How to change language

1. In the top navigation bar, click the Language switcher
2. Select English, Français, or Deutsch
3. The platform updates immediately

createAccount.title: Creating Your Account
createAccount.description: Step-by-step guide to creating a new account on ProCrèche Solutions.
createAccount.content:
Create an account

1. Open the Sign Up page (from the public site header, or go to /signup)
2. Choose your role: Foundation, Product Supplier, Service Provider, Educator, or Parent
3. Complete the registration form (name + email + password)
4. Accept the Terms and complete the CAPTCHA (if shown)
5. Click Create Account
6. Verify your email using the 6-digit code

Optional: sign up with Google
If available, click Continue with Google and follow the prompts

emailVerification.title: Email Verification
emailVerification.description: How to verify your email with the 6-digit verification code.
emailVerification.content:
Verify your email

1. After sign-up, open your inbox (and check spam/junk)
2. Find the email from ProCrèche Solutions
3. Copy the 6-digit verification code
4. Paste/type it into the verification field
5. Click Verify Email

If you didn’t receive the code
• Wait for the Resend code option to appear, then click it
• Confirm you typed the correct email address during sign-up

If the code expired
Codes expire after about 10 minutes—click Resend code to get a fresh one

signIn.title: Signing In
signIn.description: How to log in to your ProCrèche Solutions account.
signIn.content:
Sign in

1. Open the Login page (or go to /login)
2. Enter your email and password
3. Click Sign In

Optional: sign in with Google
1. Click Continue with Google
2. Select your Google account
3. You’ll be signed in automatically

navigation.title: Navigating the Platform
navigation.description: Learn how to navigate around ProCrèche Solutions using the sidebar and menus.
navigation.content:
Sidebar navigation (left menu)

After signing in, use the sidebar to open the main areas of the platform (items vary by your role).

Common click paths

• Foundation: Marketplace → Products, Marketplace → Services, Parent Leads, Recruitment → Job Listings
• Product Supplier: Orders, Product Marketplace, Analytics
• Service Provider: My Requests, Service Marketplace, Analytics
• Educator: Job Board, My Profile, Applications
• Parent: Browse Daycares, Home / Find Crèche, My Requests

Top navigation

• Notifications: click the bell icon to open your notifications (full list is on the Notifications page)
• Language: use the language switcher to change EN/FR/DE

changePassword.title: Changing Your Password
changePassword.description: How to update your account password for better security.
changePassword.content:
Change your password

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Account & Security
3. In Change Password, enter your current password
4. Enter and confirm your new password
5. Click Update Password

Tip
Use a strong, unique password and avoid reusing passwords across other services

changeEmail.title: Changing Your Email
changeEmail.description: How to update the email address associated with your account.
changeEmail.content:
Change your email address

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Account & Security
3. In Change Email Address, enter your new email
4. Click Send Verification Code
5. Check your new inbox for the 6-digit code
6. Enter the code and confirm the change

Important
You must verify the new email before the change takes effect

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: How to reset your password if you've forgotten it.
forgotPassword.content:
Reset Your Password:

1. On the login page, click 'Forgot Password?'
2. Enter your email address
3. Click 'Send Reset Link'
4. Check your email for the reset link
5. Click the link to open the reset page
6. Enter your new password
7. Confirm your new password
8. Click 'Reset Password'

Note: Reset links expire quickly for security. Request a new one if yours has expired.

profileSetup.title: Setting Up Your Profile
profileSetup.description: How to complete and optimize your profile for the best experience.
profileSetup.content:
Complete your profile

A complete profile helps you get discovered and improves your results across the platform.

How to edit your profile

• Most roles: Sidebar → Settings → Edit Profile
• Parents: click your profile menu (top right) and open Edit Profile

Recommended checklist

1. Add a clear profile/organization name and description
2. Add contact details (email, phone, website) if applicable
3. Upload a logo/profile photo (and cover image if available)
4. Click Save Changes

foundationDashboard.title: Foundation Dashboard
foundationDashboard.description: Overview of the Foundation (Daycare) dashboard and its features.
foundationDashboard.content:
How to open the Foundation Dashboard

1. In the sidebar, click Dashboard

Key areas (exact click paths)

• Marketplace → Products: browse products and place orders
• Marketplace → Services: browse services and submit service requests
• Orders & Appointments: track orders/appointments for your foundation
• Parent Leads: view and respond to parent enquiries
• Recruitment → Job Listings: create and manage job postings
• Recruitment → Candidate Pool: browse candidates and open profiles
• Messages: reply to conversations and follow-ups

parentLeads.title: Managing Parent Leads
parentLeads.description: How to view, respond to, and manage parent enquiries.
parentLeads.content:
How to open Parent Leads

1. In the sidebar, click Parent Leads

Find the right lead

1. Use the search box to filter by parent/child details
2. Use the Status filter (e.g. NEW, PROCESSING, CONVERTED)
3. Use the Response filter (e.g. Interested, Not Interested, Needs More Info)

Respond to a lead (click-through)

1. Open a lead card
2. Choose your response status (e.g. Interested)
3. (Optional) add a short message to the parent
4. Click Send

Follow up

If you need a longer conversation, use Sidebar → Messages

marketplaceOrdering.title: Ordering from the Marketplace
marketplaceOrdering.description: How to browse, order products, and request services.
marketplaceOrdering.content:
How to open the Marketplace

1. In the sidebar, click Marketplace
2. Choose Products or Services

Order products (click-through)

1. Go to Marketplace → Products
2. Open a product card to view details
3. Set quantity/options (if shown)
4. Click Add to Cart
5. Open your cart and click Checkout
6. Confirm and place the order

Request services (click-through)

1. Go to Marketplace → Services
2. Open a service to view details
3. Click Request Service
4. Complete the request form and submit

recruitmentJobs.title: Recruitment & Job Posting
recruitmentJobs.description: How to post jobs and manage candidates as a Foundation.
recruitmentJobs.content:
Create a job posting

1. In the sidebar, click Recruitment
2. Click Job Listings
3. Click Create Job Posting
4. Fill in the role details, requirements, and location
5. Click Publish (or Save) to make it live

Review applications

1. Go to Recruitment → Job Listings
2. Open a job posting to view candidates and applications
3. Use Messages to contact applicants when needed

Browse the Candidate Pool

1. Go to Recruitment → Candidate Pool
2. Open a candidate profile to review details

supplierDashboard.title: Supplier Dashboard
supplierDashboard.description: Overview of the Product Supplier dashboard and key metrics.
supplierDashboard.content:
How to open the Supplier Dashboard

1. In the sidebar, click Dashboard

Key areas (exact click paths)

• Orders: manage Direct Orders and Inquiries
• Product Marketplace: add/edit your product listings
• Analytics: view product performance metrics
• Organization Profile: review your public supplier profile
• Settings: update account/company settings

productListings.title: Managing Product Listings
productListings.description: How to add, edit, and manage your product catalog.
productListings.content:
Quick navigation (from your organization profile)

1. Open your Organization Profile
2. Click Edit Profile
3. Click My Products (next to Save Changes)
4. You’ll land on Product Listings

Adding a New Product

1. Click Add Product / Create Product
2. Complete the form (recommended order):
• Basics: Product name (required), subtitle (optional), description (required)
• Categories: primary category + additional categories (optional) + tags (optional)
• Pricing & availability: price/currency, availability status (draft/active/out of stock), visibility
• Inventory: stock status, SKU/vendor SKU/EAN, min/max order quantity (as needed)
• Media & documents: product image (recommended), optional gallery/spec sheet/MSDS
3. Click Save to publish/update your listing

Editing Products
Open any product from your list to edit details, update pricing, or change visibility.

supplierOrders.title: Managing Orders
supplierOrders.description: How to view, process, and fulfill orders as a supplier.
supplierOrders.content:
Open Orders

1. In the sidebar, click Orders

Direct Orders (click-through)

1. In the Orders page, select the Direct Orders tab
2. (Optional) filter by status (e.g. SUBMITTED, ACCEPTED, PROCESSING, SHIPPED, FULFILLED)
3. Click an order row to open the details modal
4. Update the order status and save

Inquiries (click-through)

1. Select the Inquiries tab
2. (Optional) filter by status (e.g. NEW, PENDING, CONTACTED, QUOTED, FULFILLED)
3. Click an inquiry row to open the details modal
4. Add your response and update the inquiry status

promoCodes.title: Promo Codes
promoCodes.description: How to create and manage promotional discount codes.
promoCodes.content:
Create a promo code (Product Suppliers)

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Promo Code Manager
3. Click Add Promo Code
4. Fill in the code and discount details
5. Toggle Active on if you want it available immediately
6. Click Save Promo Code

Manage existing promo codes

• Edit a code to change details
• Toggle Active on/off to enable/disable it
• Delete codes you no longer need

serviceProviderDashboard.title: Service Provider Dashboard
serviceProviderDashboard.description: Overview of the Service Provider dashboard and features.
serviceProviderDashboard.content:
How to open the Service Provider Dashboard

1. In the sidebar, click Dashboard

Key areas (exact click paths)

• My Requests: review and update incoming service requests
• Service Marketplace: add/edit your services
• Analytics: view performance metrics
• Organization Profile: review your public provider profile
• Settings: update account/company settings

serviceListings.title: Managing Service Listings
serviceListings.description: How to add and manage your service offerings.
serviceListings.content:
Quick navigation (from your organization profile)

1. Open your Organization Profile
2. Click Edit Profile
3. Click My Services (next to Save Changes)
4. You’ll land on Service Listings

Adding a New Service

1. Click Add New Service
2. Complete the form:
• Service title (required)
• Description (required)
• Service categories (required) – select suggestions or type your own and press Enter
• Delivery type (recommended) – On-site / Remote / Hybrid
• Availability (required) – e.g., “Weekdays 9:00–18:00” or “By appointment”
• Pricing details (optional) – e.g., “CHF 150/hour”
• Tags (optional) – comma-separated keywords
• Service image (optional) – upload a JPG/PNG for the marketplace card
3. Click Add (or Save Changes when editing) to publish/update the service

Service Visibility
If you need to temporarily hide a service, edit it and adjust its visibility/status from your listings view.

serviceRequests.title: Handling Service Requests
serviceRequests.description: How to view and respond to service requests from daycares.
serviceRequests.content:
Open service requests

1. In the sidebar, click My Requests

Review and respond (click-through)

1. Use the status filter if needed
2. Click a request row to open the request details
3. Review the foundation, requested service, date, and notes
4. Update the request status (e.g. NEW → IN_REVIEW → SCHEDULED → COMPLETED)
5. Save your changes

Tip
Use Sidebar → Messages if you need to coordinate details with the foundation

bookingLink.title: Booking Link Integration
bookingLink.description: How to set up an external booking link (Calendly, etc.).
bookingLink.content:
Add your booking link

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Contact & Booking
3. Find the Booking Link field
4. Paste your booking URL (e.g. Calendly)
5. Click Save Changes

What happens next

Your booking link is shown on your profile so foundations can book directly

educatorProfile.title: Educator Profile
educatorProfile.description: How to set up and optimize your educator profile.
educatorProfile.content:
View your educator profile

1. In the sidebar, click My Profile

Edit your educator profile

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Click Edit Profile
3. Complete the Profile form (role(s), location, experience, education, skills, CV)
4. Click Save Changes

Improve your visibility

• Keep your CV and contact details up to date
• Add clear experience/skills so foundations can match you to roles
• Set your availability (see Availability Settings)

jobBoard.title: Job Board
jobBoard.description: How to search and apply for jobs as an educator.
jobBoard.content:
Find and apply for jobs

1. In the sidebar, click Job Board
2. Use filters (Region/Canton, Contract Type) and search to narrow results
3. Click View Details on a job to open the job details modal
4. Click Apply and submit your application (attach/select your CV if prompted)

Track applications

1. In the sidebar, click Applications
2. Open an application to review its status and details

availabilitySettings.title: Availability Settings
availabilitySettings.description: How to set your weekly availability and date overrides.
availabilitySettings.content:
Set your availability schedule

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Click Edit Profile
3. Open the Availability Schedule tab

Weekly Schedule

1. Set your regular availability per day (add time slots as needed)
2. Review the Calendar Preview to confirm how it looks

Date Overrides

1. In Date Overrides, add exceptions for specific dates (e.g. unavailable days or custom hours)
2. Save your profile when finished

findDaycare.title: Finding Daycare
findDaycare.description: How to search for and browse daycare options.
findDaycare.content:
Browse daycares

1. In the sidebar, click Browse Daycares
2. Use Search and the Canton filter to narrow results
3. Click View Profile to open a daycare profile

Send an enquiry from the list

1. On the Browse Daycares page, click Send an Enquiry
2. You’ll be taken to the enquiry form

submitInquiry.title: Submitting an Inquiry
submitInquiry.description: How to submit a daycare inquiry as a parent.
submitInquiry.content:
Submit an enquiry (click-through)

1. In the sidebar, click Home / Find Crèche
2. Complete the enquiry form (child details, preferred start date, schedule, locations, notes)
3. Click Submit

After you submit

1. Daycares receive your enquiry
2. You can track updates in Sidebar → My Requests

trackInquiries.title: Tracking Your Inquiries
trackInquiries.description: How to view and track your daycare inquiry status.
trackInquiries.content:
Track your enquiries

1. In the sidebar, click My Requests
2. You’ll see all enquiries you’ve submitted
3. Click an enquiry to expand it and view daycare responses and updates

Common statuses you may see

• NEW / PROCESSING: your enquiry is being handled
• PARENT_ACTION_REQUIRED: a daycare needs more information from you
• CLOSED_ENROLLED: enrollment confirmed
• CLOSED_OTHER: closed for another reason

Follow up

Use Sidebar → Messages to communicate with daycares if needed

accountSecurity.title: Account Security Settings
accountSecurity.description: How to manage your account security and authentication.
accountSecurity.content:
Open Account & Security

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Account & Security

From here you can

• Change your password
• Change your email address
• Review connected accounts (if available)

Security tips

• Use a strong, unique password
• Keep your email address current
• Sign out on shared devices

notificationSettings.title: Notification Settings
notificationSettings.description: How to manage your email and platform notifications.
notificationSettings.content:
Update notification preferences

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Notification Preferences
3. Toggle the options you want (email alerts, digests, etc.)
4. Click Save Changes

View notifications

Click the bell icon in the top navigation to open your notifications

privacySettings.title: Privacy & Data Settings
privacySettings.description: How to manage your privacy settings and data.
privacySettings.content:
Update privacy & data settings

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Privacy & Data
3. Update your privacy toggles (e.g. hide publicly) and submit requests if available
4. Click Save Changes

Need help?

If you’re unsure what a setting does, contact support before requesting deletion actions

languageSettings.title: Language Settings
languageSettings.description: How to change the platform language.
languageSettings.content:
Changing Language

The platform supports three languages:
• 🇬🇧 English
• 🇫🇷 Français (French)
• 🇩🇪 Deutsch (German)

To Change Language:
1. Click the language switcher in the top navigation
2. Select your preferred language
3. The platform updates immediately

Your language preference is saved automatically.

subscriptionPlans.title: Subscription Plans
subscriptionPlans.description: Overview of available subscription plans and pricing.
subscriptionPlans.content:
Where to view plans

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Billing & Subscription
3. Review your current plan and available upgrades (if shown)

Billing options

Your available billing options and plan details are shown inside Billing & Subscription

manageSubscription.title: Managing Your Subscription
manageSubscription.description: How to view, upgrade, or cancel your subscription.
manageSubscription.content:
Manage your subscription

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Billing & Subscription
3. Review your Current Plan
4. Use the available actions (upgrade, cancel, manage) as shown on the page

If you don’t see an option you need

Use Sidebar → Support to contact the team

invoices.title: Invoices & Payment History
invoices.description: How to view and download your invoices.
invoices.content:
View invoices

1. In the sidebar, click Settings
2. Open Billing & Subscription
3. Find the Invoices / billing history area
4. Download invoices as needed

loginIssues.title: Login Issues
loginIssues.content:
Can't Log In?

Check These:
• Email address is correct
• Password is correct (check caps lock)
• Account is verified

Solutions:
• Use 'Forgot Password' to reset
• Try Google login if available
• Clear browser cache and cookies
• Try a different browser

Account Locked?
Contact support if you're locked out after multiple attempts.

verificationIssues.title: Verification Issues
verificationIssues.content:
Verification Code Not Received?

1. Check spam/junk folder
2. Wait 30 seconds, click 'Resend code'
3. Check email address is correct
4. Add our email to contacts

Code Expired?
Codes expire after ~10 minutes. Click 'Resend code' for a new one.

Code Not Working?
• Enter exactly 6 digits
• No spaces
• Use the most recent code

browserCompatibility.title: Browser Compatibility
browserCompatibility.content:
Supported Browsers:

• Google Chrome (recommended)
• Mozilla Firefox
• Microsoft Edge
• Safari

Requirements:
• Keep browser updated
• Enable JavaScript
• Enable cookies

Issues?
• Clear cache and cookies
• Disable browser extensions
• Try incognito/private mode

contactSupport.title: Contact Support
contactSupport.description: How to get help from our support team.
contactSupport.content:
Open Support

1. In the sidebar, click Support (parents may see Support & FAQ)
2. Browse FAQs or submit a support ticket

Include these details

• What you clicked (exact page and button label)
• What you expected to happen vs. what happened
• Any error message shown
• Your browser/device

Email support

support@procrechesolutions.com
